chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 712 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< On 01-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 10.12.2024. This Petition is liable to be dismissed; however, in the interest of justice matter is adjourned to 11.09.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners so also direct notice to the Petitioners for the next date of hearing.” Today, none present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. Though direct notice was issued to the petitioners and intimation notice was issued to their Counsel. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
